scripts.docker:install: docker exec -it zerux-dev-env npm run env:install
scripts.docker:dev: docker exec -d zerux-dev-env npm run env:dev
scripts.docker:start: docker exec -d zerux-dev-env npm run env:start
scripts.docker:stop: docker exec -it zerux-dev-env npm run env:stop
scripts.docker:list: docker exec -it zerux-dev-env npm run env:list
scripts.docker:restart: docker exec -it zerux-dev-env npm run env:restart
